description: A reader should fail sync when the seed opens the wire session with a HELLO whose payload node_id mismatches the envelope sender.

assertions.description: Reader rejects the opening HELLO because payload node_id must equal the envelope sender.
Reader does not write a manifest or verified object set after the HELLO sender-identity mismatch.

notes: Extends the simulator matrix with direct sender-validation coverage for HELLO node_id mismatch rejection.
The harness rewrites the generated HELLO payload node_id before replay.
